core_principle.statement: Color is a functional engineering system, not a decorative choice.
core_principle.interpretation: Every color must serve a structural, architectural, or authority function within the system.

engineering_layer.role: Structural foundation of all visual systems
engineering_layer.mandatory_usage: Must dominate typography, UI structure, and system hierarchy

architectural_layer.mandatory_usage: Must define space, layout breathing, and architectural clarity

authority_accent_layer.mandatory_usage: Only for CTA, highlights, and transformation points

hierarchy_rules.rule_1: Engineering layer always defines structural hierarchy
hierarchy_rules.rule_3: Authority accent defines importance and action points
hierarchy_rules.rule_4: No layer may visually dominate outside its assigned function

visual_balance_rules.contrast_rule: Engineering layer must always remain visually dominant in structural elements
visual_balance_rules.space_rule: Architectural layer must provide breathing space, not compete for attention
visual_balance_rules.accent_rule: Gold must appear only as a controlled signal, never as a theme
visual_balance_rules.stability_rule: No visual element should break system hierarchy clarity

color_misinterpretation_risks: Gold dominance → luxury decoration brand perception
risk_control.prevention_strategy: Strict adherence to ratio-based distribution and role separation

system_goal.objective: Ensure consistent architectural engineering perception across all brand outputs
system_goal.outcome: Instant recognition of AvizSazeh as a structured engineering system brand
